summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quick Assessment feature - 10-minute rapid screening tool with 15 multiple-choice questions, instant results with radar chart and traffic light indicators, PDF export, and save to account functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Auto-advance feature causes DOM elements to become detached during rapid question answering
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can use Next/Previous buttons for manual navigation

passed_tests: Landing page displays Quick Check and Full Assessment options
Quick Assessment intro page with company info form loads correctly
All 15 assessment questions display with proper progress bar
Results page displays with radar chart and traffic light indicators
Overall maturity score calculation and display
Individual dimension scores (People, Process, Data, Technology)
PDF export functionality generates valid PDF files
Save to account functionality (when logged in)
CTA conversion hook on results page
Dashboard stats include quick assessment counts

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (18/19 tests passed - 1 minor UI timing issue)
